info.title: Mr Monei API Gateway
info.description: External API for partners using API Key authentication

platform.description: Platform from which the user is registering

contractAddress.description: Contract address of the token. For native tokens, this may be omitted.

decimals.description: Number of decimals used by the token.

logoUrl.description: URL to the token logo (if available).

type.description: Specifies if the asset is a native coin or an ERC-20 token.

priceUSD.description: Current price of the token in USD.

rawBalance.description: Raw balance in the smallest unit (e.g., wei for ETH).

network.description: Network name the token belongs to.

walletAddress.description: EVM wallet address of the user.

totalPortfolioValueUSD.description: Total portfolio value in USD, including all tokens and native assets.

nativeToken.description: Details of the native token (e.g., ETH, BNB, MATIC).

tokens.description: List of ERC-20 or native-like tokens in the user’s wallet.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of when the portfolio was last updated.

amount.description: Amount of native token to send (e.g. ETH, BNB)

chainId.description: Chain ID (e.g. 1 for Ethereum, 56 for BSC)

nativeBalanceUsd.description: Estimated USD value of native balance

totalValueUsd.description: Total portfolio value in USD (if prices available)

accountName.description: The name of the account holder

updatedAt.description: Date when conversation was last updated

pin.description: Whether to pin or unpin the conversation

message.description: The user’s message to the agent
message.example: What's the weather in Lagos today?

chatHistory.description: Optional chat history to maintain context

apiSecret.description: Newly generated API secret (only shown once)

is_airtime.description: Indicates if the biller is an airtime provider

fee.description: Transaction fee charged by the biller

commission_on_fee.description: Indicates if commission is applied on the fee

is_resolvable.description: Indicates if the biller is resolvable

group_name.description: Group name under which the biller falls

is_data.description: Indicates if the biller is data-related

commission_on_fee_or_amount.description: How commission is applied: on fee or on amount

validity_period.description: Validity period for the biller service (if applicable)

beneficiaryName.description: Custom name for the beneficiary if saving

id.description: Unique identifier for the bill payment transaction

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the transaction was created

userId.description: User ID associated with this payment

itemCode.description: Item code for the biller service

customer.description: Customer input (e.g., phone number or account)

type.description: Type of bill payment (e.g., AIRTIME, DATA, ELECTRICITY)

metadata.description: Extra metadata provided with the payment

token.description: Token returned for some billers (e.g., electricity prepaid)

units.description: Units purchased (if applicable, e.g., kWh for electricity)

validityPeriod.description: Validity period for the service (if applicable)

beneficiaryName.description: Custom name for the beneficiary if saving
Custom name for the beneficiary if saving
Custom name for the beneficiary if saving

hasNext.description: Whether there is a next page

hasPrev.description: Whether there is a previous page

isFavorite.description: Whether this beneficiary is marked as favorite
Whether this beneficiary is marked as favorite
Whether this beneficiary is marked as favorite
Whether this beneficiary is marked as favorite

success.description: Whether the sync operation was successful

tokenAddress.description: ERC20 token address if isTokenized is true

expectedPrice.description: Expected price per token in Naira

pricePerToken.description: Price of the stock at the moment of execution

impliedAveragePrice.description: The weighted average price of all purchases

purchaseCount.description: Total number of buy orders for this asset

totalQuantity.description: Total units held after this transaction

totalInvested.description: Total USDC invested in this holding

currentValue.description: Current market value of the total holding

quantity.description: Quantity bought in this specific order

price.description: Asset price at time of purchase

totalCost.description: Total cost of this line item

totalInvested.description: Sum of all amounts invested in this asset

amount.description: Amount of native token to swap

amountOut.description: Amount of native token to swap

quoteId.description: Quote ID for executing the swap

reverseRate.description: Reverse exchange rate (1 toToken = Y fromToken)

minToAmount.description: Minimum amount you will receive (slippage applied)

estimatedGas.description: Estimated gas cost in native token

blockNumber.description: Block number this quote is based on

amount.description: Amount of native token to swap

rate.description: Exchange rate (1 input token = X output tokens)

reverseRate.description: Reverse exchange rate (1 output token = Y input tokens)

hops.description: Number of hops in the route

type.description: Type of beneficiary: bank, crypto, or peer
Type of beneficiary: bank, crypto, or peer

beneficiaryId.description: ID of the beneficiary to transfer to

otherAmount.description: Total amount of other status transactions

otherCount.description: Number of transactions with other statuses
